'''dhoralaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:wobbly|wobbly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-r-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wobbly|wobbly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dhoralaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhoralithi|dhoralithi]] || [[word:dhoraliji|dhoraliji]] || [[word:dhoralishi|dhoralishi]] || [[word:dhoraliki|dhoraliki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhoraluthuthu|dhoraluthuthu]] || [[word:dhoralujuju|dhoralujuju]] || [[word:dhoralushushu|dhoralushushu]] || [[word:dhoralukuku|dhoralukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhoraluthu|dhoraluthu]] || [[word:dhoraluju|dhoraluju]] || [[word:dhoralushu|dhoralushu]] || [[word:dhoraluku|dhoraluku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhoralufthuf|dhoralufthuf]] || [[word:dhoralufjuf|dhoralufjuf]] || [[word:dhoralufshuf|dhoralufshuf]] || [[word:dhoralufkuf|dhoralufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhoralethe|dhoralethe]] || [[word:dhoraleje|dhoraleje]] || [[word:dhoraleshe|dhoraleshe]] || [[word:dhoraleke|dhoraleke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhoralothotho|dhoralothotho]] || [[word:dhoralojojo|dhoralojojo]] || [[word:dhoraloshosho|dhoraloshosho]] || [[word:dhoralokoko|dhoralokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhoralotho|dhoralotho]] || [[word:dhoralojo|dhoralojo]] || [[word:dhoralosho|dhoralosho]] || [[word:dhoraloko|dhoraloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhoralofthof|dhoralofthof]] || [[word:dhoralofjof|dhoralofjof]] || [[word:dhoralofshof|dhoralofshof]] || [[word:dhoralofkof|dhoralofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhoralĂŻfthĂŻf|dhoralĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhoralĂŻfjĂŻf|dhoralĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhoralĂŻfshĂŻf|dhoralĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhoralĂŻfkĂŻf|dhoralĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhoralĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|dhoralĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhoralĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|dhoralĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhoralĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|dhoralĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhoralĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|dhoralĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhoralĂŻfthĂŻf|dhoralĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhoralĂŻfjĂŻf|dhoralĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhoralĂŻfshĂŻf|dhoralĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhoralĂŻfkĂŻf|dhoralĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhoralĂŻfthĂŻf|dhoralĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhoralĂŻfjĂŻf|dhoralĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhoralĂŻfshĂŻf|dhoralĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhoralĂŻfkĂŻf|dhoralĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhoralĂŠthĂŠ|dhoralĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:dhoralĂŠjĂŠ|dhoralĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:dhoralĂŠshĂŠ|dhoralĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:dhoralĂŠkĂŠ|dhoralĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhoralathatha|dhoralathatha]] || [[word:dhoralajaja|dhoralajaja]] || [[word:dhoralashasha|dhoralashasha]] || [[word:dhoralakaka|dhoralakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhoralatha|dhoralatha]] || [[word:dhoralaja|dhoralaja]] || [[word:dhoralasha|dhoralasha]] || [[word:dhoralaka|dhoralaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhoralafthaf|dhoralafthaf]] || [[word:dhoralafjaf|dhoralafjaf]] || [[word:dhoralafshaf|dhoralafshaf]] || [[word:dhoralafkaf|dhoralafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dhoralasha|dhoralasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhoralshĂ«sha|dhoralshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhoralrosha|dhoralrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhoralmusha|dhoralmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhoralyasha|dhoralyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhoralnkshĂ«sha|godhoralnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhoralnkrosha|godhoralnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhoralnkmusha|godhoralnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhoralnkyasha|godhoralnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dhoraralasha|dhoraralasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhoraralshĂ«sha|dhoraralshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhoraralrosha|dhoraralrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhoraralmusha|dhoraralmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhoraralyasha|dhoraralyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhoraralnkshĂ«sha|godhoraralnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhoraralnkrosha|godhoraralnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhoraralnkmusha|godhoraralnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhoraralnkyasha|godhoraralnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dherĂŠlasha|dherĂŠlasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dherĂŠlshĂ«sha|dherĂŠlshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dherĂŠlrosha|dherĂŠlrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dherĂŠlmusha|dherĂŠlmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dherĂŠlyasha|dherĂŠlyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godherĂŠlnkshĂ«sha|godherĂŠlnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godherĂŠlnkrosha|godherĂŠlnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godherĂŠlnkmusha|godherĂŠlnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godherĂŠlnkyasha|godherĂŠlnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dhorfalasha|dhorfalasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhorfalshĂ«sha|dhorfalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhorfalrosha|dhorfalrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhorfalmusha|dhorfalmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhorfalyasha|dhorfalyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhorfalnkshĂ«sha|godhorfalnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhorfalnkrosha|godhorfalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhorfalnkmusha|godhorfalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhorfalnkyasha|godhorfalnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
